tiers.label: Anchor
tiers.description: Locked commitments the system never moves. Classes, work shifts, Sunday service, fixed recurring obligations.
tiers.system_behavior: Display only. Never suggest moving or skipping.

tiers.label: Commitment
tiers.description: Should happen but timing is flexible. Workouts, study blocks, practice goals.
tiers.system_behavior: Surface in brief as scheduled. Flag if at risk of being skipped.

tiers.label: Intention
tiers.description: Optional enrichment. Idea exploration, deep work sessions, creative projects.
tiers.system_behavior: Surface as a menu of options, not requirements. Never flag as missed.
